payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped view of the lower portion of a dark reddish-brown wooden cabinet with a glossy varnish, vertical paneled doors and rectangular metal handles visible; top and right side are cut off and wood grain and base molding are apparent — estimated distance ~1.2 m from camera.
